arts.ttl: 'I left boyhood club Liverpool – Trent Alexander-Arnold should consider doing the same'
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold is expected to join Real Madrid when his Liverpool contract expires in the summer, and a former Reds stars thinks it might be for the best

arts.ttl: Liverpool set to discover squad truth that could have huge impact on title race
arts.sum: The true value of Liverpool's squad is about to be revealed as Arne Slot prepares to increase his heavy rotation this season

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals private Jurgen Klopp chat about pressing Liverpool title issue
arts.sum: Liverpool are six points clear of Arsenal in the race for the Premier League title and Arne Slot has revealed he has turned to his Anfield predecessor Jurgen Klopp for advice

arts.ttl: Liverpool set for proof of Richard Hughes impact as long-term plan now paying off
arts.sum: Richard Hughes is being questioned as Liverpool sporting director - but the Reds will soon have evidence of his worth

arts.ttl: David Coote issues tearful apology to Jurgen Klopp and Liverpool after X-rated rant
arts.sum: Former Premier League referee David Coote has apologised for his actions in a tearful interview where he discusses the leaked video showing him criticising Jurgen Klopp and Liverpool

arts.ttl: Liverpool XI vs PSV: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup and injury latest for Champions League today
arts.sum: Rotation likely for Liverpool with Champions League qualification already secured

arts.ttl: Dams set for shock PSV departure
arts.sum: Matteo Dams is leaving PSV Eindhoven to join for Saudi Arabian side Al-Ahli. The Belgian broke into the PSV first team this season and has been very impressive at left-back. Dams was in talks with PSV over a new deal but according to Fabrizio Romano and several reports in the Netherlands, he is on his […] The post Dams set for shock PSV departure appeared first on Football Oranje.

arts.ttl: AFCON 2025 draw in full: Mohamed Salah and Egypt face nightmare group as Nigeria take on Tunisia
arts.sum: Tournament begins in Morocco on December 21
